beforeStartBoxes: I am using this as reviewer-facing scaffolding, not final course material.
I have not created or overwritten docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json.
I will keep all generated prompts, examples, and source excerpts out of real notes unless actual human review supports original wording.
I will keep every lesson structural_draft until separate human rewrite and factual review are complete.

runbookItems.label: Open operator index
runbookItems.action: Confirm this is the active entrypoint and all readiness flags remain false.
runbookItems.stopIf: Any readiness, release, approval, or production flag turns true.

runbookItems.label: Read the one-page execution order
runbookItems.action: Use the bundle to confirm the longer file order after this page.

runbookItems.label: Use the printable lesson pack
runbookItems.action: Work through 12 lesson cards, 72 note fields, and 5 direct candidates on paper or manually.
runbookItems.stopIf: Any note field is prefilled by generated scaffolding.

runbookItems.label: Resolve direct candidates
runbookItems.action: Choose confirm after review, downgrade, or block for every direct-candidate source role.
runbookItems.stopIf: A generated row is treated as confirmed source evidence.

runbookItems.label: Read source-fit summary
runbookItems.action: Compare confirm, downgrade, and block criteria before any future sourceFitNotes are written.
runbookItems.stopIf: The summary is treated as a decision, confirmation, approval, or write authorization.

runbookItems.label: Use blank sourceFitNotes cards
runbookItems.action: Prepare the 5 blank cards and leave all 35 required fields empty until real review.
runbookItems.stopIf: Any card field is prefilled or treated as a real note.

runbookItems.label: Check card misuse guards
runbookItems.action: Confirm simulated card prefill, unsafe wording, source misuse, and yellow/red drift are rejected.
runbookItems.stopIf: A polluted card state is treated as a valid note or source confirmation.

runbookItems.label: Read positive note shapes
runbookItems.action: Use sample-only confirm, downgrade, and block note shapes as writing guidance.
runbookItems.stopIf: Sample text is copied as real reviewer evidence or treated as source confirmation.

runbookItems.label: Run sourceFitNotes fill preflight
runbookItems.action: Check reviewer identity, 5 candidate decisions, source identity basis, and no-copy requirements before real note entry.
runbookItems.stopIf: Preflight output is treated as write permission or real source confirmation.

runbookItems.label: Check note wording before write
runbookItems.action: Use examples only for safe shape; write original notes only after real review.
runbookItems.stopIf: Examples, prompts, or source body text are copied into notes.

runbookItems.label: Run preflight before any overlay write
runbookItems.action: Confirm writeAllowedNow remains false until explicit human note-taking starts.
runbookItems.stopIf: The real overlay appears without deliberate human start.

runbookItems.label: Audit dry-run bundle consistency
runbookItems.action: Confirm dry-run, overwrite protection, day-zero handoff, final rehearsal, and write locks still agree.
runbookItems.stopIf: The audit grants write permission or finds command-order drift.

runbookItems.label: After future write, run command pack
runbookItems.action: Use the strict post-write command order only after a human-created overlay exists.
runbookItems.stopIf: Execution is treated as proof while the overlay is absent.

runbookItems.label: Intake complete notes only
runbookItems.action: Use intake as triage after real notes pass lint and completion.

runbookItems.label: Keep separate approval separate
runbookItems.action: Send only complete intake candidates to a later separate human approval review.
runbookItems.stopIf: Any auto-approval, release, grade promotion, or production claim appears.

runbookItems.label: Read launch blockers
runbookItems.action: Treat the dashboard as a blocker map, not readiness.
runbookItems.stopIf: internalTrialReady, launchReady, or productionReady becomes true.

hardStops: Stop if any artifact claims approval, learner-facing release, commercial readiness, internal-trial readiness, launch readiness, or production readiness.
Stop if any note contains buy/sell/hold advice, trading signals, performance claims, broker/order workflow, automation, copied source prose, or real-money guidance.
Stop if any yellow, red, or research_only source is proposed as learner-facing evidence.
Stop if real reviewer notes are created by generated scaffolding rather than deliberate human review.
boundary: This one-page runbook is reviewer-facing manual scaffolding only. It does not create docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json, fill human notes, confirm source use, approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, change grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, guide real-money decisions, grant internal-trial readiness, or make the product production-ready.
